task_completion.description: Open the target presentation in LibreOffice Impress.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Impress application is open, and the title bar displays 'release_readiness.odp'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to Slide 1 of the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide 1 is highlighted in the left slide pane and its contents are visible in the main editing workspace.
The 'Bullets and Numbering' dialog box is open, or the bullet properties section in the right sidebar is expanded and active.

task_completion.description: Change the bullet character to a checkmark symbol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bullet characters in the list on Slide 1 have changed from default dots to a checkmark symbol (e.g., ✓, ✔, ☑, ✅, 🗸).

task_completion.description: Change the bullet color to green.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The color of the checkmark bullet symbols on Slide 1 is clearly green. Note: Only the bullet symbols need to be green, not the text.
A save action is performed (clicking the floppy disk icon or File > Save), or the title bar shows no unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) after the modifications are complete.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with LibreOffice Impress menus, dialogs, and toolbars, rather than terminal commands or python scripts modifying the .odp file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the original text content of the bullet points was not altered or deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text next to the bullets (e.g., 'QR Code generator improvements', 'Support for zoom gestures when using touchpads') must remain intact and readable.

integrity.description: Verify no other slides or unrelated elements were modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The overall layout of Slide 1 and the contents of other slides (if visible) should remain unchanged.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/release_readiness.odp'. Acceptable checkmark characters include ✓, ✔, ☑, ✅, and 🗸. Acceptable colors include #008000, #006400, #228b22, #32cd32, #00ff00, and standard green. The original text includes 'QR Code generator improvements' and 'Support for zoom gestures when using touchpads'; this text must remain intact.
